Plaintiff'S Amended Motion For Protective Order And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff Lonnie Bartlett's motion for a protective order is granted. Dan Anderson shall not be permitted to attend the deposition of defendant Tom Ward. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion For Protective Order And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
